title: Bitfarms Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: According to 4 analysts covering Bitfarms, company has Buy consensus rating as of April 18, 2026. Price target forecasts vary across sources. Based on short-term price targets from 8 analysts, average price target for Bitfarms comes to $4.75 with forecasts ranging from low of $4.00 to high of $6.50. Three analysts covering Bitfarms stock have consensus rating of Buy and average price target of $4.00 forecasting 81.82% increase in stock price over next year. Average price target in Canadian dollars is C$5.44 with high forecast of C$7.00 and low forecast of C$4.18. Bitfarms reported significant decline in adjusted EBITDA with loss of $9.6 million in Q4 2025 and experienced net loss from continuing operations of $139.9 million representing challenging financial backdrop despite bullish analyst ratings. These price targets suggest continued confidence in long-term strategy despite near-term challenges and valuation compression.
